stories.title: Structured JSON output from Claude
stories.description: Replace fragile CSV parsing with JSON output from Claude for BOQ generation
acceptanceCriteria: boq-generator.ts requests JSON output from Claude with a defined schema
Parser reads JSON directly — no regex, no CSV split
BOQ rows correctly parsed with commas in descriptions handled natively
TypeScript compiles with no errors (npm run build)
git push succeeds and Vercel deploys successfully

stories.title: Rate library in Supabase DB
stories.description: Store rates in a Supabase rates table, pull dynamically into BOQ prompts
acceptanceCriteria: Supabase migration creates rates table with columns: id, category, item, unit, rate_min, rate_max, city_baseline, brand, source_url, updated_at
rates table seeded with all rate library entries from current system prompt
boq-generator.ts fetches rates from DB before calling Claude
City multiplier applied from cities table or config
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: City vendor database
stories.description: Pre-seed verified vendors per city in Supabase instead of live web search every time
acceptanceCriteria: Supabase migration creates vendors_db table: id, city, category, vendor, specialty, area, lat, lng, rating, phone, verified_at
Table seeded with 5+ verified vendors per category for Hyderabad and Mumbai
vendor-finder.ts queries vendors_db first, falls back to web_search if < 3 results
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: BOQ formula verifier
stories.description: Server route that verifies qty*rate arithmetic after generation
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/verify/boq?id=<projectId> returns {errors: [], total_rows: N, ok: true/false}
Checks each boq_row: amount should equal qty * rate within 1% tolerance
Returns list of failing rows with expected vs actual
Integrated into generate route — runs automatically after BOQ save
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Multi-render accuracy improvement
stories.description: Improved Vision prompt with room context linking across multiple renders
acceptanceCriteria: room-analyzer.ts sends all renders in a single Claude call when multiple images provided
Prompt instructs Claude to cross-reference rooms (e.g. note if ceiling style consistent)
Returns array of RoomAnalysis objects in same order as input
Single-image case still works
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Rate source scraper
stories.description: Cron job to scrape brand websites weekly and update rates in DB
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/cron/scrape-rates endpoint exists and is protected by CRON_SECRET
Scrapes at least 3 brand pages (e.g. atomberg.com fans, kajariaceramics.com tiles, hettich.com hardware)
Updates rates table with new rate_min/rate_max and updated_at
vercel.json configures weekly cron schedule
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Branded PDF with @react-pdf/renderer
acceptanceCriteria: @react-pdf/renderer installed as dependency
GET /api/download/boq-pdf?id=<projectId> streams a PDF response
PDF contains: Houspire header (green #1B4D3E), client name, city, tier, full BOQ table, rate sources
File named Houspire_BOQ_{client}_{city}.pdf
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: BOQ inline edit
stories.description: Let staff edit BOQ line items in the UI before downloading
acceptanceCriteria: BOQ table rows are editable (click to edit category, description, unit, qty, rate)
Amount column recalculates in real-time as qty/rate change
Save button commits edited rows to Supabase boq_rows table
Download buttons reflect edited data
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Project comparison
stories.description: Compare two saved projects side by side
acceptanceCriteria: /projects/compare?a=<id>&b=<id> page exists
Page loads both projects from DB and renders side-by-side tables
Highlights rows present in one but not the other
Shows total cost comparison at top
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: WhatsApp share
stories.description: One-click share BOQ summary to client via WhatsApp
acceptanceCriteria: Share button appears on downloads section after generation
Clicking opens WhatsApp web/app with pre-filled message containing client name, city, item count, total estimated cost, and project link
Message format: 'Houspire BOQ for {client} - {city} | {N} items | Est. ₹{total} | View: {url}'
Works on mobile (opens WhatsApp app) and desktop (opens web.whatsapp.com)
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys
